## Meeting Purpose

[Gather unique insights from Town's senior tax manager for content marketing to drive organic traffic to Town's website.](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jess Holt, senior tax manager at Town, primarily works with tech startups (C-Corps) and small businesses (S-Corps/partnerships)](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Key tax planning distinctions for startups vs. SMBs: R\&D expenses, startup costs, and organizational expenses](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Common SMB tax mistakes: partners paying themselves as employees, S-Corp owners unaware of accountable plans](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Crucial importance of regular tax planning check-ins, especially for rapidly growing businesses](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Retirement planning is a major overlooked opportunity for tax optimization across all business types](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

## Topics

### Town's Client Base and Tax Manager Role

  - [Jess interacts directly with clients, prepares tax packages, and conducts reviews](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Primary clients: tech startups (C-Corps), with a mix of S-Corps and partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Small business clients range from personal training to consulting and rental real estate](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Startup vs. SMB Tax Planning Distinctions

  - [Startups: Focus on R\&D expenses, startup costs, and organizational expenses](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Startups often have 3-4 years of product development before profitability](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [SMBs: Generally ready to generate revenue immediately, fewer startup-specific expenses](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Common SMB Tax Misconceptions and Mistakes

  - [Partnerships: Partners incorrectly paying themselves as employees](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Consequences: Potential IRS issues, difficulty reclaiming paid taxes](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [Solution: Correct ASAP, use guaranteed payments instead of payroll](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [S-Corps: Owners unaware of limitations on deductions (e.g., home office, mileage)](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Solution: Implement an accountable plan through payroll for similar benefits](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Distributions in excess of basis: Often occurs due to lack of regular tax planning](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [Can result in unexpected taxation on distributions](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Tax Planning for Rapid Revenue Growth

  - [Crucial to adjust estimated tax payments to avoid year-end surprises](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage losses or explore tax credits (e.g., vehicle purchases)](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Importance of quarterly check-ins for proactive planning](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Business Entity Structures for Different Industries

  - [Rental real estate: Partnership model preferred over C-Corp or S-Corp](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
      - [Benefits: Step-up in basis, ability to use debt as basis](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Medical professionals: Typically S-Corps for individual practices, partnerships for larger groups](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Entity choice depends on specific business goals and activities](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)

### Rental Property Tax Considerations

  - [Common mistakes in depreciation calculations:](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
      - [Incorrect basis establishment (e.g., excluding closing costs)](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
      - [Misclassification of improvements vs. repairs](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Cost segregation studies: More applicable to manufacturing than residential/commercial rentals](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

### Tax Optimization for Medical Professionals

  - [Often overlooked deductions: Travel expenses for continuing education, speaking engagements](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Equipment depreciation: Utilize bonus depreciation and Section 179 when appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

### Retirement Planning for Small Business Owners

  - [Major overlooked opportunity for tax optimization across all business types](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Small business owners often lack knowledge about available retirement plan options beyond 401(k)s and IRAs](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Complexity of choosing appropriate plans (e.g., SIMPLE IRA vs. SEP IRA) can be overwhelming](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Incorporate insights into content marketing strategy, focusing on common pain points and misconceptions](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Develop content around often-overlooked tax optimization strategies (e.g., retirement planning for SMBs)](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Create educational materials on entity structure selection for different industries](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Highlight the importance of regular tax planning check-ins, especially for rapidly growing businesses](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [When using direct quotes, send to Jess for review and approval before publication](https://fathom.video/share/Ha13SzKHQ-UUPztBJd-YvBXhsnEqpgEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
